reviews.comment:
Creo que rrhh, tiene que renovar el personal y poner a gente que verdaderamente quiera trabajar, como es posible que estamos haciendo fila más de 20autos un lunes a las 07.30am
Es un desastre, los empleados a los besos, no vuelvo nunca más

(Translated by Google)
I think HR needs to renew the staff and hire people who actually want to work. How is it possible that there are more than 20 cars in line on a Monday at 7:30 am?
It's a disaster, the employees are all over each other. I'm never coming back.
